originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&x` is never used.

model:
(define-fun CONFIG_UNIX98_PTYS () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_DEVPTS_MULTIPLE_INSTANCES () Bool
  true)
reasoning: Line 8: `int x = *inode` in pts_sb_from_inode() (compiled when DEVPTS=T). Known VBDB bug at L8 (ERROR comment). The bug requires DEVPTS=T. UNIX98=F only means ptmx_open() is not compiled, but pts_sb_from_inode() is still defined and analyzable whenever DEVPTS=T. UNIX98=F is unnecessary. PC over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_OVER.
